question: Stats defaults: 95% CI, 10k paired bootstrap resamples on per-task deltas; effect size = mean paired delta + Cliff's delta
author: claude/design

question: Auto confound flags: interleave imbalance, provider-error asymmetry, telemetry-null asymmetry, egress violations, version drift
author: claude/design

question: MDE reported with every finding; null results phrased as no-effect-geq-MDE-detected; secondary metrics labeled exploratory
author: claude/design

question: CI method selection: resample tasks as clusters; choose percentile vs BCa vs cluster-robust-t by empirical coverage under the null-simulation harness at the experiment N?
author: claude/design

question: AN-3 fail-closed: add a cant_analyze(reason) event so a refused render lands one event instead of escaping the CLI with none?
migration: Additive hash-chained event type 'cant_analyze' {mode,reason,detail}; reasons are a closed set {calibration_incomplete,unregistered_metric,disclosure_missing,provenance_invalid,analyze_error}. Backward-compatible: existing ledgers simply lack the type, so no existing chain is invalidated (additive event TYPE, not a field on an existing event). The success path additionally emits findings_rendered BEFORE writing the findings files so an interrupted write leaves a re-derivable provenance record, not orphan artifacts. Implemented Phase 3 slice 3D.
author: jyang
